importModal.title: Add Staff with Excel
importModal.dropzonePlaceholder: Click to choose a file or drag it here

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.downloadTemplate: Download the template and use the UUIDs from the Branches page as reference.
howItWorks.fillData: Fill in staff data (required: first name, last name, email, role). If branch ID is left empty, the selected branch is used.
howItWorks.temporaryPassword: If the password is empty, the system generates a temporary password and shows it only once.
howItWorks.skipExisting: Existing emails are skipped and not overwritten.

preview.noValidRows: There are no valid rows to import.

result.temporaryPasswordWarning: Temporary passwords are shown only once. Please store them securely.
result.invitationFailedWarning: Some users were created but the invitation email could not be sent. They can set a password via 'Forgot password'.

importModal.allClinicsHint: You are in all-branches view. Select the target branch for import:
importModal.clinicContext: Users will be imported to the selected branch.
